upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pra hi kratuM bfhaTo yaM vanuTo raDrasya sTo yajamAnasya codO (f॰2.30.6)
'dasyUn… hatvA pfTivyAM SarvA nibarhIt' (f0 110018) nibarhIt=nyabarhIt=akartIMt SakalAnyakArzIMt
'yatkArave daSa vftrARyaprati barhizmate ni sahasrARi barhayaH' (f0 1536 aTarva0 20216) nibarhayaH=nyavarhayaH=udasAdayaH vyanASayaH
'anasUyAvratEstAta pratyUhASca nibarhitA' (rA0 211711) nibarhitA vinASitAH apohitAH apAkftAH
'tatogniH saMprajajvAla daSagrIvanibarhaRaH' (rA0 69617) daSAnanakalevarapraDvaMsakaH daSakanDaraSavasya dAhaka ityarTaH
